---
title: "fix_last_ts.js"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/fix_last_ts.js"
loc: 38
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 4.87
intel_score: 10.00
overall_score: 6.99
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 10.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://fs)
- [*](file://path)

### Exports
- `walkDir`
- `dirPath`
- `isDirectory`
- `processFile`
- `content`
- `dbPath`
- `dbContent`
- `pPath`
- `pContent`
